00027 #ifndef JELATINE_PRINT_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_PRINT_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "constantpool.h"
00033 #include "method.h"
00034 #include "thread.h"
00035 
00036 #if JEL_PRINT
00037 extern void print_bytecode(thread_t *, const uint8_t *, const_pool_t *);
00038 extern void print_method_call(thread_t *, const method_t *);
00039 extern void print_method_ret(thread_t *, const method_t *);
00040 extern void print_method_unwind(thread_t *, method_t *);
00041 #else
00042 
00043 #define print_bytecode(thread, pc, cp)
00044 
00045 #define print_method_call(thread, method);
00046 
00047 #define print_method_ret(thread, method);
00048 
00049 #define print_method_unwind(thread, method);
00050 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00051 
00052 #endif // JELATINE_PRINT_H
